data.reasoning: Shelter verification failed due to missing physical barriers, overhead cover, and coordinate evidence. Need to build a sealed cell: 3x3x3 interior with walls, floor, ceiling, and a door. Current inventory has 6 dirt and 7 oak_log. Can use dirt for walls and floor, oak_log for ceiling. Need to place blocks to form a 3x3x3 sealed cell. Start by digging a 3x3 floor area at current position, then build walls and ceiling.

schema_validation.expected_goal: Reach or build emergency verified shelter immediately

data.reasoning: Shelter verification failed due to missing physical barriers, overhead cover, and coordinate evidence. Need to build a sealed cell: 3x3x3 interior with walls, floor, ceiling, and a door. Current inventory has 7 dirt and 7 oak_log, enough for walls and ceiling. Need to craft a door from oak_planks (requires 6 oak_planks = 2 oak_log). First, gather more oak_log if needed, then craft planks and door, then place blocks to enclose shelter.

subtasks.title: Gather additional oak_log
subtasks.rationale: Need at least 2 more oak_log to craft door and planks for shelter.

subtasks.title: Craft oak_planks from oak_log
subtasks.rationale: Need planks for door and possibly other components.

subtasks.title: Craft oak_door from oak_planks
subtasks.rationale: Door is required for shelter entrance.

subtasks.title: Build shelter walls and ceiling
subtasks.rationale: Place dirt and logs to form walls, floor, and ceiling of a 3x3x3 sealed cell.
